scores.correctness_notes: Covers all gold standard content plus additional valid details like riscv64 architecture, build-base usage, and legacy bases format. All core concepts correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: riscv64 listed as a supported architecture in the supported architectures section - the gold standard only lists amd64, arm64, armhf, ppc64el, s390x. riscv64 may be valid but is not in the gold standard. Also 'all' platform build-on list includes riscv64 which may not be supported. Minor uncertainty here.
